endpoints.response_shape: HTML page — live free counts and capacity rendered inline in the pattern "{free} / {total}" per parking. No data-* attributes or embedded JSON.
endpoints.notes: HTML-only data source — consumers must parse HTML. Capacity, max height shown next to each parking; addresses and coordinates are not in the page markup. The same site uses ?commune=Vevey and other communes for the rest of the Riviera region.

parkings.name: Clarens Centre
parkings.notes: Page shows "NC" — currently no live data.

parkings.notes: Page shows no capacity / no live data at the time of snapshot.
